execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

mut line_opt = io.read_line()
while true
  match line_opt
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    if n == 0
      print("")
    else
      if n <= 3
        println("#{line} -> short")
      else if n <= 7
        println("#{line} -> medium")
      else
        println("#{line} -> long")
      end
    end
    line_opt = io.read_line()
  when None
    return
  end
end
